test_type: P1 Preview Gaps Verification - Sprint B Intelligence Features
summary: All 4 P1 preview gap features verified working correctly: (1) Pending Queues requester store health mini-bar, (2) Direct Dispatch YOUR STOCK AFTER projection + duplicate dispatch warning, (3) ReceiveDialog dispatched vs requested comparison, (4) ApproveWaveDialog FEFO auto-select with badges.

tests.feature: Pending Queues - Requester Store Health Mini-bar
tests.details: 3 approval cards (PO-0074, PO-0075, PO-0113) each show requester store health mini-bar below item table: 'My Genie store health: ●1 out ●67 low 96 adequate'. Mini-bar shows colored dots for out/low/adequate counts. Urgent requests (>=2 out) get red background highlight.

Each approval card has: Reject button (red), View Details button, Approve All button. Partial Approve button appears for multi-item requests. Age badges (6 days ago, 5 days ago) and 'Can fulfill' badges visible.
Item tables show columns: ITEM REQUESTED, QTY REQUESTED, YOUR STOCK, AFTER APPROVAL. After Approval column shows projected stock after fulfilling request.

tests.feature: Direct Dispatch - What This Store Needs Table
tests.details: After selecting DemoFranchise1 as destination, 'WHAT THIS STORE NEEDS (4 items)' section appears with columns: Item, Their Stock, Min Threshold, Gap, Your Stock, Your Stock After. Shows items below minimum threshold at destination.

tests.feature: Direct Dispatch - YOUR STOCK AFTER Projection
tests.details: Your Stock After column shows projected stock after dispatching gap quantity. Negative projections displayed in red with '(insufficient)' text: red meat -372 kg, maida -298.65 kg, Cooking Oil -104.88 kg, patri -35.17 kg.
Amber warning banner: 'You already dispatched to this store today (1 transfer)' appears when selecting a destination that received a dispatch today. Uses AlertTriangle icon.
Items with zero stock at destination (red meat, patri) show red 'OUT' badge next to item name. Row has red background highlight.

/transfer/74 shows 'REQUESTER STORE SNAPSHOT — DEMOFRANCHISE4' section with 4 stat cards (0 Out of Stock, 0 Low Stock, 4 Adequate, 4 Total Items). Item table shows Stock Level, Min Threshold, Status (OK badges), and 'In This Request?' column (patri shows 'Yes — 0.1 kg').

'APPROVAL IMPACT ON YOUR STOCK' section shows table with Item, Requested, Your Stock, After Approval columns. patri: 0.1 kg requested, 64.83 kg your stock, 64.73 kg after approval. Amber warning: 'Approving will reduce your stock as shown above'.

PO-0134 ReceiveDialog shows each line item with 'Dispatched: X kg' and 'Requested: X kg' labels. Match badge (green) appears when quantities match. Mismatch badges show 'X less than requested' or 'X more than requested' when different.
Green summary section shows 'After receiving:' with stock additions per item: '12 CVT BOX → +5 kg, 24 CVT BOX → +5 kg'. Partial Receive toggle available.

Partial Approve dialog for PO-0074 shows segment picker with FEFO-sorted options. First segment (nearest expiry) has 'FEFO Recommended' badge (blue). Segments show expiry badges: 'Exp 180d', 'Exp 313d'.

Segment dropdown shows: BATCH-patri-A — 55 avail (FEFO Recommended, Exp 180d), PATRI-BATCH-01 — 7.8 avail (Exp 313d), FINAL-PATRI-01 — 1 avail (Exp 313d), Seg #37 — 1.03 avail. Remainder policy selector (Hold/Cancel) available.

issues: API responses take 10-20 seconds due to external POS API calls - expected behavior

critical_code_review_comments: PendingQueues.jsx: Requester health mini-bar correctly fetches hierarchy-detail per unique requester and displays out/low/adequate counts with colored dots
DirectDispatchForm.jsx: YOUR STOCK AFTER projection correctly calculates ownQty - gap and displays negative values in red with '(insufficient)' suffix
DirectDispatchForm.jsx: Duplicate dispatch warning correctly checks transfer history for same-day dispatches to selected destination
ReceiveDialog.jsx: Dispatched vs Requested comparison uses dispatchedDisplayTotal from meta_json.dispatch and requestedDisplayQty for accurate comparison
ApproveWaveDialog.jsx: FEFO sorting correctly orders segments by expiry_date ascending, first segment gets 'FEFO Recommended' badge
seed_data_creation: None - used existing POS API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 preview gap features verified. Key test paths: (1) /queues for Pending Queues with requester health mini-bar below each approval card's item table. (2) /dispatch/new with DemoFranchise1 selected shows 'What This Store Needs' table with YOUR STOCK AFTER column and duplicate dispatch warning. (3) /transfer/74 for Transfer Detail with Requester Store Snapshot and Approval Impact sections. (4) Login as franchise user (owner@demofranchise1.com) to test ReceiveDialog with dispatched vs requested comparison. (5) ApproveWaveDialog shows FEFO-sorted segments with 'FEFO Recommended' badge on nearest-expiry segment.
